name: Digital Services Act
description: EU Digital Services Act (Regulation (EU) 2022/2065) — establishes rules for digital services to protect users online. Applies to intermediary services, hosting services, online platforms, very large online platforms (VLOPs), and very large online search engines (VLOSEs). Defines content moderation, transparency, risk assessment, and recommender system obligations.
relationToCloudSecurity: Affects cloud-hosted platforms operating in the EU. SaaS platforms classified as VLOPs face heightened obligations.
relationToAISecurity: Recommender systems and AI-driven content moderation are explicitly regulated.

license.notes: EU legislation published in OJEU. Reuse permitted under EUR-Lex terms; attribution expected.

lifecycle.notes: Effective 2023-11-16 for VLOPs/VLOSEs; 2024-02-17 for all in scope.
